writing.welcome.title: Welcome to OET Writing
writing.welcome.subtitle: Five stages take you from baseline diagnostic to exam-day mastery.
writing.welcome.hero.title: Welcome — let's set up your Writing pathway
writing.welcome.hero.description: Five stages take you from baseline diagnostic to exam-day mastery, with daily plans, AI coach hints, and Dr Ahmed's canon at every step.
writing.welcome.pathway.heading: The 5-stage pathway
writing.welcome.pathway.subtitle: Each stage unlocks the next once you meet the readiness checks. The diagnostic builds your personal plan.
writing.welcome.cta.heading: Ready when you are
writing.welcome.cta.subtitle: We need a few quick details to choose your diagnostic letter and tailor your daily plan.
writing.welcome.stages.onboardingDescrip: Tell us your profession, target band, exam date, and weekly time.
writing.welcome.stages.diagnosticDescrip: A timed 50-minute letter to baseline your six criteria.
writing.welcome.stages.practiceDescripti: Daily letters, coach hints, exemplar comparison, revisions.
writing.welcome.stages.masteryDescriptio: Mocks, tutor reviews, and exam-day readiness.
writing.profileSetup.profession.title: Tell us who you are
writing.profileSetup.profession.subtitle: Your profession decides letter types we drill and scenarios we surface.
writing.profileSetup.goals.title: Set your target and weekly budget
writing.profileSetup.focus.title: What letter types do you need most?
writing.profileSetup.focus.subtitle: Pick at least two.
writing.profileSetup.confirm.title: Review and confirm
writing.diagnostic.briefing.title: Diagnostic Assessment
writing.diagnostic.briefing.subtitle: A 50-minute baseline of your six writing criteria.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.hero.title: A 50-minute baseline of your six writing criteria
writing.diagnostic.briefing.hero.descrip: One letter under real exam timing. Your score builds your personal pathway and seeds your daily plan.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.format.subti: You'll get one timed letter task in your chosen profession. The format mirrors the real OET writing exam.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.timeline.rea: Read the case notes (Case Notes). Editor is locked, copy-paste disabled.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.timeline.wri: Write a 180-220 word letter. Spell-check ON, coach OFF.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.timeline.gra: AI rubric + canon engine score across six criteria.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.strict.title: Strict mode reminders
writing.diagnostic.briefing.strict.item1: Reading and writing windows cannot be paused.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.strict.item2: Stay in the browser tab — switching is allowed but the timer keeps running.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.strict.item3: If you reload the page mid-attempt, your progress is restored from the server.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.ready.title: Ready to begin?
writing.diagnostic.briefing.ready.subtit: You can pause before you click Start — once the timer begins, the credit is used.
writing.diagnostic.briefing.error.profil: Could not load your profile. Complete onboarding first.
writing.diagnostic.session.placeholderRe: The writing window opens after 5 minutes of reading.
writing.diagnostic.session.helper.notSta: You can submit once the writing window starts.
writing.diagnostic.session.helper.tooSho: Letter is too short to submit (50 word minimum).
writing.diagnostic.session.helper.ready: You can submit any time during the writing window.
writing.diagnostic.session.error.startWr: Could not start the writing window.
writing.diagnostic.results.title: Your diagnostic result
writing.diagnostic.results.hero.descript: The same six-criterion rubric used in the live exam. Each score is paired with rule-cited feedback so you know exactly what to fix.
writing.diagnostic.results.criteria.head: Criteria radar
writing.diagnostic.results.criteria.subt: Where you sit against a target B-band profile.
writing.diagnostic.results.canon.heading: Canon violations ({count})
writing.diagnostic.results.canon.subtitl: Dr Ahmed's style canon — fix these first; they hold back C4 and C6.
writing.diagnostic.results.exemplar.head: Side-by-side with a gold-standard exemplar
writing.diagnostic.results.exemplar.subt: Word-level differences are highlighted; hover an annotation marker to see the rule.
writing.diagnostic.results.cta.heading: Start your pathway
writing.diagnostic.results.cta.subtitle: Today's plan is ready — first item picks up from your weakest criterion.
writing.skillTree.title: W1-W8 — the eight skills every OET letter rests on

writing.caseNoteDrills.title: Case-note drills
writing.canon.library.hero.title: Dr Ahmed's Writing rules in one place
writing.canon.library.hero.description: The first pathway release exposes the launch canon and your recent rule-violation history without exposing grading prompts or model internals.
writing.canon.library.browse.title: Find a rule
writing.canon.library.browse.description: Filter by text, category, rule id, or severity.
writing.canon.library.error.load: Could not load the Writing canon.
writing.canon.detail.examples.title: Examples
writing.canon.detail.lessonPrompt: There's a linked micro-lesson for this rule.
writing.canon.detail.history.heading: Your personal history
writing.canon.detail.history.summary: You've triggered this rule {count, plural, one {# time} other {# times}} across your recent letters.
writing.canon.detail.error.load: Could not load this canon rule.

writing.today.title: Today's Writing plan
writing.today.hero.description: Adaptive plan built from your pathway, weakness signal, and last-graded letters.
writing.today.section.description: Tap Start to open the workspace. Mark complete when finished.
